Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to understand the data Timestamps from 08 59 50 to 09 08 15 Actions FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH CLICK SCROLL HIGHLIGHT CLOSE Apps Microsoft Word Google Chrome Adobe Acrobat Microsoft Excel Windows Contexts Quarterly Report docx Document1 docx Email Inbox Report Draft pdf Budget 2024 xlsx

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Key objectives 1 Data Transformation 2 Case Identification Group related events into coherent cases for example editing a specific document handling an email or reviewing a certain PDF 3 Activity Naming Translate raw actions into higher level process steps 4 Event Attributes Case ID Activity Name Timestamp and possibly others 5 Coherent Narrative 6 Explanation of logic

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Sequence of events 1 08 59 50 FOCUS Word Quarterly Report docx 2 09 00 00 FOCUS Word Document1 docx 3 09 00 30 TYPING Document1 docx 4 09 01 00 TYPING Document1 docx 5 09 01 15 SAVE Document1 docx 6 09 01 45 SWITCH Word Document1 docx to Chrome Email Inbox 7 09 02 00 CLICK Chrome Email Inbox Open Email about Annual Meeting 8 09 02 30 SCROLL Chrome Email Inbox 9 09 02 45 CLICK Chrome Email Inbox Reply to Email 10 09 03 00 TYPING Chrome Email Inbox Meeting details confirmed 11 09 03 20 CLICK Chrome Email Inbox Send Email 12 09 04 00 SWITCH Chrome Email Inbox to Adobe Acrobat Report Draft pdf 13 09 04 30 SCROLL Adobe Acrobat Report Draft pdf 14 09 04 45 HIGHLIGHT Adobe Acrobat Report Draft pdf Key Findings 15 09 05 00 FOCUS Excel Budget 2024 xlsx 16 09 05 15 TYPING Excel Budget 2024 xlsx 17 09 05 30 TYPING Excel Budget 2024 xlsx 18 09 05 45 SAVE Excel Budget 2024 xlsx 19 09 06 00 SWITCH Excel Budget 2024 xlsx to Word Document1 docx 20 09 06 15 TYPING Word Document1 docx 21 09 06 30 SAVE Word Document1 docx 22 09 07 00 CLOSE Word Document1 docx 23 09 07 15 FOCUS Word Quarterly Report docx 24 09 07 45 TYPING Word Quarterly Report docx 25 09 08 00 SAVE Word Quarterly Report docx 26 09 08 15 CLOSE Word Quarterly Report docx

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Document1 docx Events at 09 00 00 09 00 30 09 01 00 09 01 15 then switch away then return at 09 06 00 09 06 15 09 06 30 09 07 00 This seems like one case editing Document1 docx interrupted by email and PDF review then resumed and closed Quarterly Report docx Events at 08 59 50 then at 09 07 15 returned 09 07 45 09 08 00 09 08 15 close This is another case Email From 09 01 45 switch to Chrome then actions until 09 03 20 send then at 09 04 00 switch away Case for handling email about Annual Meeting Report Draft pdf From 09 04 00 switch to Adobe scroll highlight then at 09 05 00 switch away Case for reviewing PDF Budget 2024 xlsx From 09 05 00 focus typing save then switch away at 09 06 00 Case for updating budget

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So I can define 5 cases Case 1 Document1 docx editing session Case 2 Quarterly Report docx editing session Case 3 Email Annual Meeting Case 4 Report Draft pdf review Case 5 Budget 2024 xlsx update

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user starts with Quarterly Report then quickly switches to Document1 works on it saves then goes to email then PDF then Excel then back to Document1 saves closes it then back to Quarterly Report works and closes it So yes 5 cases make sense

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Raw actions and proposed standardized activities FOCUS first interaction with artifact in case Open Document or Start Work on Document TYPING Edit Content or Write Content SAVE Save Work CLICK Open Email Reply to Email Send Email SCROLL Review Content HIGHLIGHT Highlight Text

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: SWITCH is more of a transition system event We could either exclude SWITCH events and just have the activities within each case or include SWITCH as an activity like Switch Context Given that we are grouping by case document email PDF spreadsheet the SWITCH events are actually the boundaries between cases or interruptions

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Actually for the Email case there is no FOCUS event The first event is CLICK at 09 02 00 For the PDF case there is no FOCUS event either The first event is SCROLL at 09 04 30 preceded by SWITCH So if we want a Start event for PDF we would need to derive it from SWITCH or just start with SCROLL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets do this SWITCH events are mapped to the target case ToApp ToWindow with activity Open target item or Resume Work This makes the cases more complete and explains the arrival

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case IDs are derived from the primary artifact Document1 docx Quarterly Report docx Email about Annual Meeting Report Draft pdf and Budget 2024 xlsx Each event is assigned to the case corresponding to its application and window context or target window for SWITCH
